metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: An invasion threatens the realm. Forge powerful weapons from artifacts hidden in treacherous dungeons and deliver them to the armory in Jadegate.

towns.name: Jadegate
towns.description: A forest clearing settlement where druids and woodsmen live side by side.

key_dungeons.name: Crumbling Barrow
key_dungeons.description: A rusted iron gate bars the path into Crumbling Barrow. It swings open with a tortured groan at your touch.
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact pulses with ancient energy.
